# WangJie's blog

> Personal blog of Wang Jie — writing on technology, games, and algorithms. Posts are primarily in Chinese (zh-CN).

## Site

- [Homepage](https://iwj.moe/): profile, links, and latest writing
- [Blog index](https://iwj.moe/blog/): all posts, newest first
- [Archives](https://iwj.moe/blog/archives/): posts grouped by year
- [Tags](https://iwj.moe/blog/tags/): posts by topic

## Feeds & maps

- [Atom feed](https://iwj.moe/blog/atom.xml): the 10 most recent posts, full content
- [Sitemap](https://iwj.moe/sitemap-index.xml): every page on the site
